_doc: Shared artifact-type registry — the single source of truth for the type vocabulary. Parallax daemon reads this for tier classification. Doc-provenance validators validate against this set. Adding a type here registers it in both systems. Amendments: proposal → independent review → bilateral agreement → version bump.

findings.description: Measurement or exercise with reproducible method

evidence_axis._doc: Shared evidence-tier scale for claims_index (rung 2). Orthogonal to the authority axis above — evidence describes how a CLAIM is grounded, not what KIND of document states it. Non-overlapping terms: measured/inferred/conjectural (avoids collision with authority's derived/speculative).

measured.description: Reproducible measurement — the claim is backed by a runner, experiment, or exercise output

inferred.description: Derived from measurement — the claim reasons from measured data but is not itself a direct measurement

conjectural.description: Hypothesis, not yet grounded — the claim is proposed but not yet measured
